my_thoughts: Get them to name ?the superior man? so I can flip ?superior? to other readings (many, crafty) and show the rule breaks. Expect initial compliance, then resistance when the consequence appears.
accumulated_insight: T1: Student asserts nature thesis (?By nature, the stronger and better should rule the weaker?)?cooperative engagement via asserts_principle. They understand: hierarchy by nature; ?stronger? presumed obvious. The constraint_collapse/UM_02 move asks: who is stronger? forcing them to specify the criterion. Pattern: bold nature claim + criterion test queued. Medium confidence because students usually supply a criterion before noticing the trap.
visible_response: And you call ‘stronger’ the majority or the one?
